ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "countyFIPS" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county (FIPS code) */,
  "CountyName" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "State" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "StateFIPS" INTEGER /* State FIPS code */,
  "Population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "Area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "TimeZone" TEXT /* Time zone of the county */,
  "CountySeat" TEXT /* Name of the county seat */,
  "Latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county */,
  "Longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("countyFIPS")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "countyFIPS" INTEGER /* Reference to the county (FIPS code) */,
  "pop" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "age" REAL /* Median age of the county population */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Median household income */,
  "PercCollege" REAL /* Percentage of population with college degree */,
  "PercVets" REAL /* Percentage of population who are veterans */,
  "MedianHouseholdIncome" INTEGER /* Median household income */,
  "PovertyRate" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in poverty */,
  "RaceDistribution" TEXT /* Distribution of races in the county */,
  "HouseholdSize" REAL /* Average household size */,
  "EducationLevel" TEXT /* Distribution of educational levels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_countyFIPS FOREIGN KEY ("countyFIPS") REFERENCES counties ("countyFIPS")
)

CREATE TABLE "economy" (
  "economic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic record */,
  "countyFIPS" INTEGER /* Reference to the county (FIPS code) */,
  "Unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the county */,
  "per_gop" REAL /* Percentage of votes for the Republican party */,
  "per_dem" REAL /* Percentage of votes for the Democratic party */,
  "GDP" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the county */,
  "EmploymentRate" REAL /* Employment rate */,
  "AverageWage" INTEGER /* Average wage */,
  "IndustryDistribution" TEXT /* Distribution of industries in the county */,
  "BusinessCount" INTEGER /* Number of businesses in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economy_countyFIPS FOREIGN KEY ("countyFIPS") REFERENCES counties ("countyFIPS")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime record */,
  "countyFIPS" INTEGER /* Reference to the county (FIPS code) */,
  "violent_crime" INTEGER /* Number of violent crimes in the county */,
  "property_crime" INTEGER /* Number of property crimes in the county */,
  "MurderRate" REAL /* Murder rate */,
  "RobberyRate" REAL /* Robbery rate */,
  "BurglaryRate" REAL /* Burglary rate */,
  "TheftRate" REAL /* Theft rate */,
  "ArsonRate" REAL /* Arson rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_countyFIPS FOREIGN KEY ("countyFIPS") REFERENCES counties ("countyFIPS")
)

CREATE TABLE "law_enforcement" (
  "enforcement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each law enforcement record */,
  "countyFIPS" INTEGER /* Reference to the county (FIPS code) */,
  "officers_killed_by_felony" INTEGER /* Number of law enforcement officers killed by felony */,
  "officers_assaulted" INTEGER /* Number of law enforcement officers assaulted */,
  "TotalOfficers" INTEGER /* Total number of law enforcement officers */,
  "OfficerDemographics" TEXT /* Demographic distribution of officers */,
  "Budget" REAL /* Budget for law enforcement */,
  "FundingSource" TEXT /* Source of funding for law enforcement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enforcement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_law_enforcement_countyFIPS FOREIGN KEY ("countyFIPS") REFERENCES counties ("countyFIPS")
)

CREATE TABLE "health" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "countyFIPS" INTEGER /* Reference to the county (FIPS code) */,
  "PercHealth" REAL /* Percentage of population with health insurance */,
  "HighMaskUsage" REAL /* Percentage of population with high mask usage */,
  "LifeExpectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy */,
  "ObesityRate" REAL /* Obesity rate */,
  "SmokingRate" REAL /* Smoking rate */,
  "HealthcareAccess" REAL /* Percentage of the population with access to healthcare */,
  "MentalHealthRate" REAL /* Rate of mental health issues */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_countyFIPS FOREIGN KEY ("countyFIPS") REFERENCES counties ("countyFIPS")
)

CREATE TABLE "agriculture" (
  "agriculture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agricultural record */,
  "countyFIPS" INTEGER /* Reference to the county (FIPS code) */,
  "Corn" INTEGER /* Amount of corn production in the county */,
  "Soy" INTEGER /* Amount of soy production in the county */,
  "Vegetables" INTEGER /* Amount of vegetable production in the county */,
  "TotalAgriculturalLand" INTEGER /* Total agricultural land in acres */,
  "IrrigatedLand" INTEGER /* Amount of irrigated land in acres */,
  "Livestock" INTEGER /* Number of livestock */,
  "AgriculturalRevenue" REAL /* Annual agricultural revenue */,
  "FarmingMethods" TEXT /* Types of farming methods used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agriculture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agriculture_countyFIPS FOREIGN KEY ("countyFIPS") REFERENCES counties ("countyFIPS")
)

CREATE TABLE "area" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area record */,
  "countyFIPS" INTEGER /* Reference to the county (FIPS code) */,
  "Area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "PopulationDensity" REAL /* Population density */,
  "UrbanArea" REAL /* Area of urban areas in square miles */,
  "RuralArea" REAL /* Area of rural areas in square miles */,
  "WaterArea" REAL /* Area of water bodies in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_countyFIPS FOREIGN KEY ("countyFIPS") REFERENCES counties ("countyFIPS")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case record */,
  "countyFIPS" INTEGER /* Reference to the county (FIPS code) */,
  "Total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 cases in the county */,
  "Total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 deaths in the county */,
  "RecoveryRate" REAL /* Recovery rate for COVID-19 cases */,
  "VaccinationRate" REAL /* Vaccination rate */,
  "TestingRate" REAL /* Testing rate */,
  "HospitalizationRate" REAL /* Hospitalization rate */,
  "CaseSeverity" TEXT /* Severity of cases (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_countyFIPS FOREIGN KEY ("countyFIPS") REFERENCES counties ("countyFIPS")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "Department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "LastLogin" TEXT /* Last login date */,
  "AccessLevel" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "CreatedDate" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "UpdatedDate" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "countyFIPS" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "IPAddress" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "UserAgent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "Duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event */,
  "DataSize" REAL /* Size of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_countyFIPS FOREIGN KEY ("countyFIPS") REFERENCES counties ("countyFIPS"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "countyFIPS" INTEGER /* Reference to the county (FIPS code) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "FileType" TEXT /* Type of data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  "Checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity */,
  "DataSource" TEXT /* Source of the data file */,
  "LastModified" TEXT /* Last modified date of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_countyFIPS FOREIGN KEY ("countyFIPS") REFERENCES counties ("countyFIPS")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "countyFIPS" INTEGER /* Reference to the county (FIPS code) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "FileType" TEXT /* Type of readme file (e.g., text, markdown) */,
  "Checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity */,
  "DataSource" TEXT /* Source of the readme file */,
  "LastModified" TEXT /* Last modified date of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_countyFIPS FOREIGN KEY ("countyFIPS") REFERENCES counties ("countyFIPS")
)
